title: Cannot find file containing module in search dir when module name >127 characters

features.name: long module name with file-based lookup
features.description: Code should include a module definition with name exceeding 127 characters, instantiated from a separate file with -y search directory

features.name: module instantiation from separate file with long name
features.description: Code should include module instantiation where the called module has a name exceeding 127 characters and is defined in a separate file

features.name: long module name truncation with V suffix hash
features.description: Code should include a module name longer than 127 characters that undergoes name truncation and V-suffix hashing during file resolution
